summary: Heavy focus on a SaaS crypto trading platform and custom hardware firmware, alongside research projects in computer vision and crypto modelling. Continued development of Windows Explorer utilities, Android LLM assistants, and personal infrastructure tooling.

items.title: Profile card generator refinements
items.description: Polished the automated CV timeline and profile card generation workflow.

items.title: Profile card rendering updates
items.description: Iterated on the custom SVG profile card generator and its automated deployment.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Continued building the AI-driven algorithmic crypto trading platform.

items.title: Proxy fork maintenance
items.description: Maintained a Mihomo fork with custom API support for a FlClash client.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Iterated on a Telegram integration node for n8n workflows, focusing on stability and new triggers.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Polished the file and folder tagging extension for Windows Explorer, preparing store releases.

items.title: Personal Neovim development environment
items.description: Maintained and updated a personal Neovim IDE configuration for compatibility and new features.

items.title: On-host YOLO labelling tool
items.description: Built a minimalistic, fast YOLO annotation tool for personal computer vision projects.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Released a major update for the Windows Explorer file tagging tool with extended property support.

items.title: Telegram automation node for n8n
items.description: Worked on session handling and deployment support for the n8n Telegram node.

items.title: SaaS crypto trading platform
items.description: Actively developed the core AI and neural network components of a crypto trading platform.

items.title: ESP32-S3 input emulation firmware
items.description: Built feature-rich mouse and keyboard emulation firmware for embedded hardware.

items.title: Crypto price prediction research
items.description: Conducted R&D on predictive models for cryptocurrency price movements.

items.title: Computer vision for online poker
items.description: Explored computer vision techniques for analysing online poker platforms.

items.title: Windows Explorer file tagging utility
items.description: Worked on a next-generation version of the Windows Explorer file tagging utility.

items.title: On-device LLM assistant for Android
items.description: Developed a pocket LLM assistant with phone use capabilities on Android.

items.title: Trading strategy implementations
items.description: Developed and tested custom trading strategies for the Freqtrade framework.

items.title: Autonomous multi-session AI coding tool
items.description: Built tooling for autonomous, multi-session AI-assisted software development.

items.title: CV and input emulation research
items.description: Researched computer vision combined with mouse and keyboard event emulation.
